chapter: Chapter 3: Body movements musculo skeletal system

questions.question: Some animals, such as moles, rabbits, and certain insects, are adapted to dig and move underground. They use strong ______ (blank) or specialized structures to dig tunnels and move through soil.
questions.explanation: This is based on the content in Section 26.

questions.question: Red muscle fibres are rich in myoglobin and contain numerous ______ (blank).
questions.explanation: This is based on the content in Section 24.

questions.question: Mosquitoes identify humans using a combination of ______ (blank), body heat, and visual cues.
questions.explanation: This is based on the content in Section 27.

questions.question: Only female mosquitoes bite because they need ______ (blank) to develop their eggs.
questions.explanation: This is based on the content in Section 27.

questions.question: Red muscle fibres are well adapted for ______ (blank) respiration, allowing them to sustain long-duration activities such as marathon running.
questions.explanation: This is based on the content in Section 24.

questions.question: Red muscle fibres contain more ______ (blank) than white muscle fibres.
questions.explanation: This is based on the content in Section 24.

questions.question: The vertebral column in adults is made up of ______ (blank) bones.
questions.explanation: This is based on the content in Section 23.

questions.question: Red muscle fibres fatigue quickly due to high ______ (blank) consumption.
questions.explanation: This is based on the content in Section 24.

questions.question: These fibres are well-suited for ______ (blank) rather than endurance activities.
questions.explanation: This is based on the content in Section 24.

questions.question: Muscle fibres are classified into two main types: red muscle fibres and ______ (blank) muscle fibres.
questions.explanation: This is based on the content in Section 25.

questions.question: The primary difference between red and white muscle fibres is their ability to ______ (blank) efficiently for endurance activities.
questions.explanation: This is based on the content in Section 25.

questions.question: Red muscle fibres are more efficient for ______ (blank) activities due to more mitochondria and myoglobin.
questions.explanation: This is based on the content in Section 25.

questions.question: White muscle fibres have less ______ (blank) than red muscle fibres, giving them a paler colour.
questions.explanation: This is based on the content in Section 25.

questions.question: Red muscle fibres contain numerous ______ (blank) and are well adapted for aerobic respiration.
questions.explanation: This is based on the content in Section 24.

questions.question: Some grasshoppers use their ______ (blank) to dig tunnels and move through soil.
questions.explanation: This is based on the content in Section 26.
